claim_text: Controlled worlds have programmatic gold A/U/N/C computed by independent world-physics (separate code path from the analyzer); typed-graph analyzer recovers gold while a flat ledger misses derived/temporal claims.
statistical_support: typed ACR > flat ACR on derived/temporal worlds (deterministic)

claim_text: Naive LLM revision (Claude/Codex) misses obligated downstream (derived/temporal) updates and/or over-revises preserved claims.
Providing the typed-graph impact set raises a real model's ACR/UCP over the naive prompt (structure helps the agent).
The constrained typed-graph patch beats full regeneration on the joint ACR/UCP objective.
limitations: deterministic baselines computed; LLM arm pilot

claim_text: An evidence-world delta induces a different obligated-change set than an equivalent author edit (framing is not cosmetic).
